headline: Cybersecurity stocks surging
detail: Headlines confirm cyber names are running hard today. CRWD is your direct exposure here — this is the tailwind behind its positive status. Doesn't change the broader margin risk, but it's a bright spot in your book right now.

headline: Alphabet +4% on Dow debut, Big Tech rebounding
detail: Alphabet joining the Dow and popping 4% lifts sentiment across big tech. This supports your QQQ, QQQI, and SMH holdings and gives the broader tape a risk-on feel today, but it's one day — don't let it mask the weak names in your book.

headline: Kalshi traders expect weak jobs report this week
detail: Prediction markets are pricing in a jobs miss Friday. A disappointing report typically triggers a rate-uncertainty spike and a tech/growth selloff — exactly the names you're concentrated in. On margin, that kind of move can blow through stops fast, so make sure AVGO and PLTR levels are set and real.

headline: Supreme Court blocks Trump from firing Fed Governor Cook
detail: Fed independence staying intact is modestly positive for markets — removes one uncertainty around monetary policy. Doesn't directly move chips or tech, but stable Fed governance keeps the macro backdrop less chaotic, which benefits your growth-heavy book.
